cases.prompt: UPH 분석 데이터를 수식 들어간 멀티시트 엑셀로 만들어줘.

assertions.text: Generates a real .xlsx via openpyxl with multi-sheet and actual formula strings (e.g. =ROUND, cross-sheet refs)
Installs the prerequisite libs first (pip install python-docx openpyxl python-pptx weasyprint)
Verifies the output file exists, is non-empty, and round-trips by reopening it

cases.prompt: Create a Word report from this summary, then export it to PDF.

assertions.text: Builds the .docx via python-docx (from docx import Document), not the wrong 'docx' package
Produces the PDF via weasyprint, or falls back to LibreOffice headless / make-pdf when Windows GTK is missing, stating which step was blocked
